title: Global ProcScript Library Editor
text: Global ProcScript Library Editor Use the Global ProcScript Library Editor to create and edit Global ProcScript modules, which are linked into components at runtime when called from ProcScript in a Uniface application. A new or updated Global ProcScript must be compiled to generate the runtime object. If Uniface detects errors in the code, you must correct the error or comment out the incorrect code. Worksheets Define Structure—create new Global ProcScript objects and edit their properties. Write Script—write the code for the Global ProcScript. How to Creating Global ProcScripts Using the Uniface IDE Working with Development Objects Related Links Global ProcScripts Global ProcScripts are global objects that are located in a runtime library and can be called from any ProcScript in the application. They enable you to define common functionality for use by one or more applications. call Execute the specified function or global ProcScript. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
